title: astelia cockaynei
intro: Astelia cockaynei, also known as the 'Red Fountain' or 'Coastal Astelia', is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, Astelia cockaynei is often combined with other plants to create topical creams, salves, and ointments that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
